creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)
> fwiw, this is the same trick as used in lang/gcc7.
> (Perhaps the comment should be ported over as well.)

Agreed, and agreed.

And thank you for the report and patch, Piotr.  Turns out due to my
current travels (vacation) I was too slow and one of our fellow committers
beat me to applying essentially the same.

So, closing this as fixed.  Please advise if there's anything I might have
missed.
